user.title: Maytronics Dolphin (BLE)
user.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your Dolphin robot (as shown in the Bluetooth integration or nRF Connect).

init.title: Maytronics Dolphin options
init.description: By default HA connects for each poll/command, then disconnects. Responsive mode keeps a dedicated BLE session and uses faster PS_State polling (best when HA is your only controller). Use Release Bluetooth or power-cycle if the BT LED gets stuck.

data.ble_keepalive_seconds: Periodic BLE release (ignored when persistent session is on)
